title: Comment
description: A community discussion comment on a Lobsters story

short_id.description: Short alphanumeric identifier for the comment

short_id_url.description: Full URL to the comment's short-id redirect

url.description: Full URL to the comment in context of its story

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the comment was posted

last_edited_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last edit

is_deleted.description: Whether the comment has been deleted by the author

is_moderated.description: Whether the comment has been removed by a moderator

score.description: Net vote score for the comment

flags.description: Number of flags the comment has received

parent_comment.description: Short ID of the parent comment; null for top-level comments

depth.description: Nesting depth in the comment thread (0 = top level)
